response.title: Senior Corporate Counsel
response.description: We are seeking a Senior Corporate Counsel to join our dynamic legal team. The ideal candidate will provide expert legal advice on corporate governance, compliance, and transactional matters. This role requires strong analytical skills, proactive problem-solving, and the ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams. You will manage complex legal issues and ensure the company's operations align with regulatory requirements while supporting business growth.

requirements.education: Juris Doctor (JD) from an accredited law school
